properties.Test Case: Record sentences and text boxes, then copy and duplicate pages, and copy and paste the text. Exit book and then return. Ensure you don't see any duplicate audio IDs.
properties.Steps: Record sentences and text boxes, then copy and duplicate pages, and copy and paste the text. Exit book and then return. Ensure you don't see any duplicate audio IDs.

properties.Test Case: Open book from BL-9467. The duplicate audio IDs should be detected and repaired and a message to that effect should be shown. Exit book and then return to Edit. This time, there should be no message about the duplicate IDs. Publish the book to BR. If should publish without a crash or error, but note the recording for the letter J is repeated all over the place (an artifact of the original error).

properties.Test Case: In a new book, record a paragraph in sentence mode then re-record it in paragraph-mode. Exit book, edit another one, then re-edit original book. Ensure the extraneous (sentence) recordings have been cleaned up/deleted from the book's audio folder.
